results.title: India’s retail lending expands 16.6 pc led by gold loans growth: Report
results.description: New Delhi, May 20 (IANS) India’s retail lending portfolio expanded to Rs 170.2 lakh crore as of March 2026, marking 16.6 per cent year‐on‐year growth and a 4.6 per cent quarter‐on‐quarter increase, a report said on Wednesday. The report from CRIF High Mark said consumption loans grew 15.3 per cent year‐on‐year to Rs 118.6 lakh ...

results.title: Wake Smith to support domestic abuse charity
results.description: A Sheffield law firm has chosen a long-running domestic abuse charity as its new fundraising partner. Wake Smith Solicitors will support Sheffield Women’s Aid until April 2027 after employees voted to back the organisation through a programme of fundraising events. Established in 1974, Sheffield Women’s Aid provides safe accommodation and specialist trauma-informed... Read more
